[{"filename":"app/serializers/user_serializer.rb","patchWithLinesStr":"## file: 'app/serializers/user_serializer.rb' @@ -40,6 +40,7 @@ def self.untrusted_attributes(*attrs) __new hunk__ 40 :bio_cooked, 41 :created_at, 42 :website, 43 + :website_name, 44 :profile_background, 45 :card_background, 46 :location, @@ -133,6 +134,26 @@ def website __new hunk__ 134 object.user_profile.website 135 end 136 137 + def website_name 138 + website_host = URI(website.to_s).host rescue nil 139 + discourse_host = Discourse.current_hostname 140 + return if website_host.nil? 141 + if website_host == discourse_host 142 + # example.com == example.com 143 + website_host + URI(website.to_s).path 144 + elsif (website_host.split('.').length == discourse_host.split('.').length) && discourse_host.split('.').length > 2 145 + # www.example.com == forum.example.com 146 + website_host.split('.')[1..-1].join('.') == discourse_host.split('.')[1..-1].join('.') ? website_host + URI(website.to_s).path : website_host 147 + else 148 + # example.com == forum.example.com 149 + discourse_host.ends_with?("." << website_host) ? website_host + URI(website.to_s).path : website_host 150 + end 151 + end 152 + 153 + def include_website_name 154 + website.present? 155 + end 156 + 157 def card_image_badge_id 158 object.user_profile.card_image_badge.try(:id) 159 end"},{"filename":"app/assets/javascripts/discourse/templates/user/user.hbs","patchWithLinesStr":"## file: 'app/assets/javascripts/discourse/templates/user/user.hbs' @@ -63,12 +63,12 @@ __new hunk__ 63 {{/if}} 64

"},{"filename":"app/assets/javascripts/discourse/controllers/user.js.es6","patchWithLinesStr":"## file: 'app/assets/javascripts/discourse/controllers/user.js.es6' @@ -14,12 +14,6 @@ export default ObjectController.extend(CanCheckEmails, { __old hunk__ collapsedInfo: Em.computed.not('indexStream'), - websiteName: function() { - var website = this.get('model.website'); - if (Em.isEmpty(website)) { return; } - return website.split("/")[2]; - }.property('model.website'), - linkWebsite: Em.computed.not('model.isBasic'), removeNoFollow: function() {"},{"filename":"app/assets/javascripts/discourse/models/user.js.es6","patchWithLinesStr":"## file: 'app/assets/javascripts/discourse/models/user.js.es6' @@ -56,7 +56,7 @@ const User = RestModel.extend({ __new hunk__ 56 /** 57 This user's profile background(in CSS). 58 59 + @property profileBackground 60 @type {String} 61 **/ 62 profileBackground: function() { __old hunk__ /** This user's profile background(in CSS). - @property websiteName @type {String} **/ profileBackground: function() {"}]
vars.goldenComments: [{"comment":"The include_website_name method is missing the required ? suffix. Rails serializers expect include_ methods to end with ? for conditional attribute inclusion, a convention followed by other methods in this serializer. Without it, the website_name attribute may not be conditionally included as intended. Additionally, the '.' << website_host string concatenation should be replaced with '.' + website_host or '.#{website_host}' to avoid mutating string literals, which can lead to issues.","severity":"Medium"}]
